criteria.description: Maps each existing test claim to an observable regression before judging its quality.
Classifies the repository-mocked persistence claim as fake or shallow and cites the real test location.
Identifies the status-only assertion as insufficient for the durable order and audit behavior being claimed.
Proposes the smallest real boundary that retains the persistence risk carrier while allowing unrelated third-party notification to remain doubled.
Reports false confidence and missing evidence without presenting unimplemented replacement tests as passing.

forbidden.description: Treats every test double as invalid without considering which collaborator carries the claim.
Uses coverage percentage as the primary quality verdict.
